summary: Units are coordinating an exposure assessment regarding a wildfire, but no persons were visually confirmed near the potential structure.

key_communications.text: Unit Phi here, command. Report current fire conditions and spread direction. Listening.
key_communications.speaker: SPEAKER_01

key_communications.text: Command here, Unit Phi. Active wildfire in the forested area, multiple trees involved, heavy smoke moving across the clearing. Listening.
key_communications.speaker: SPEAKER_00

service_inference_basis.text: Command here, Unit Phi. Negative visual confirmation of persons at this time. Smoke is limiting visibility near the house and access path. Listening.

role_inference_basis.text: ROLE_CONTEXT.has_fire is true and an on-scene field unit exists (radio_signals.on_scene_field_units non-empty OR radio_signals.on_scene_responders_count >= 1). The person with proximity_rank == 1 (closest to fire) is the responder operating at the fire.
Civilians at safe distance description applies to persons not closest to fire. Person ID 2 has proximity_rank 2.
